### Fix 1
Line: 167
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed]:
Property 'Button.variant' had its type changed (property): Return type of `variant` changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Button/Button.ButtonProps.d.ts
Before: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
After: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: warning

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropTypeChange
Component: Button
Prop: variant
From: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
To: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

### Fix 2

Rule [family:Modal]:
## Modal Family Migration

Target structure (correct v6 composition):
```jsx
  <Modal appendTo={...} backdropClassName={...} disableFocusTrap={...} elementToFocus={...} id={...} isOpen={...} maxWidth={...} onClose={...}>
    <ModalBody role={...} />
    <ModalHeader description={...} descriptorId={...} help={...} labelId={...} title={...} titleIconVariant={...} titleScreenReaderText={...} />
    <ModalFooter />
  </Modal>
```

Props that stay on <Modal>: appendTo, backdropClassName, disableFocusTrap, elementToFocus, id, isOpen, maxWidth, onClose, onEscapePress, ouiaId, ouiaSafe, position, positionOffset, variant, width

Props that move to child components:
  description -> <ModalHeader />
  help -> <ModalHeader />
  title -> <ModalHeader />
  titleIconVariant -> <ModalHeader />

Removed props (move to child component as children or remove):
  actions -> map to appropriate child component (any)
  bodyAriaLabel -> ModalBody (as children, string)
  bodyAriaRole -> ModalBody (as children, string)
  footer -> ModalFooter (as children, ReactNode)
  hasNoBodyWrapper -> map to appropriate child component (boolean)
  header -> ModalHeader (as children, ReactNode)
  showClose -> map to appropriate child component (boolean)
  titleLabel -> map to appropriate child component (string)

Removed children (no longer valid JSX): ModalBoxCloseButton, ModalContent, ModalBox, ModalBoxBody, ModalBoxHeader, ModalBoxFooter

Add imports: ModalBody, ModalHeader, ModalFooter from '@patternfly/react-core'

Remove imports (if no longer used): ModalBoxCloseButton, ModalContent, ModalBox, ModalBoxBody, ModalBoxHeader, ModalBoxFooter

Deprecated -> v6 migration:
  Old import: @patternfly/react-core
  New import: @patternfly/react-core

New props on replacement:

Removed props (no replacement equivalent): actions, bodyAriaLabel, bodyAriaRole, description, footer, hasNoBodyWrapper, header, help, showClose, title, titleIconVariant, titleLabel

### Fix 3
Line: 166
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: TextContent

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

```
  166                <Button
  167                  variant="warning"
```


Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/odf-console/source/packages/odf/modals/s3-iam/DeleteAccessKeyModal.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me reason through each fix:

**Fix 1 (Line 167):** `Button variant="warning"` — The value `"warning"` still exists in the new type (`'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`). No change needed — the only difference is the addition of `'stateful'`.

**Fix 2 (Line 123):** Modal family migration — Multiple changes needed:
- Remove `title` and `titleIconVariant` props from `<Modal>`, add `<ModalHeader>` child with those props
- Remove `actions` prop from `<Modal>`, move its content into `<ModalFooter>`
- Wrap the content children (`TextContent`, `Alert`, `FormGroup`) in `<ModalBody>`
- Add imports for `ModalBody`, `ModalHeader`, `ModalFooter`

**Fix 3 (Line 166):** Button icon children to prop — Looking at the Button at line 166, it contains text `{t('Deactivate')}`, not an icon. No icon element from `@patternfly/react-icons` is present. No change needed.

**Fix 4 (Line 15):** `TextVariants` → `ContentVariants` — Rename the import and all usages.

**Fix 5 (Line 21):** `Text` → `Content` — Replace `<Text>` with `<Content>` in JSX usages and update imports. Since `TextContent` is also being replaced with `Content` (Fix 6), we need to handle this carefully — both `Text` and `TextContent` map to `Content`.

**Fix 6 (Line 14):** `TextContent` → `Content` — Replace `<TextContent>` with `<Content>` in JSX. Since `Text` also becomes `Content` (Fix 5), the old `<TextContent>` wrapper with `<Text>` children becomes just `<Content>` with `<Content component={...}>` children.

Wait — let me re-read the migration guidance. Fix 5 says "Remove `<Text>` from JSX and move its props to `<Content>`". Fix 6 says "Remove `<TextContent>` from JSX and move its props to `<Content>`". 

In PF v6, `<TextContent>` is replaced by `<Content>` and `<Text component={TextVariants.p}>` is replaced by `<Content component="p">`. The `TextVariants` enum becomes `ContentVariants`.

So the pattern:
```jsx
<TextContent className="text-muted">
  <Text component={TextVariants.p}>...</Text>
</TextContent>
```
becomes:
```jsx
<Content className="text-muted">
  <Content component={ContentVariants.p}>...</Content>
</Content>
```

Now let me write the complete fixed file:

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — `Button.variant` type changed (line 167)
**No change needed.** The value `"warning"` is still valid in the new type union (the only change was the addition of `'stateful'`).

### Fix 2 — Modal family migration (line 123)
**Applied.** Multiple changes:
- Removed `title` and `titleIconVariant` props from `<Modal>` and created a `<ModalHeader title={...} titleIconVariant="warning" />` child.
- Removed the `actions` prop from `<Modal>` and moved its content (the `<ButtonBar>` with `<ActionGroup>`) into a `<ModalFooter>` child (removed the wrapping array and `key="actions"`).
- Wrapped the body content (`<Content>`, `<Alert>`, `<FormGroup>`) in `<ModalBody>`.
- Added `ModalBody`, `ModalHeader`, `ModalFooter` to the import statement.

### Fix 3 — Button icon children to prop (line 166)
**No change needed.** The `<Button>` at line 166 contains only text (`{t('Deactivate')}`), not an icon from `@patternfly/react-icons`. The rule does not apply to this button.

### Fix 4 — `TextVariants` → `ContentVariants` (line 15)
**Applied.** Replaced `TextVariants` with `ContentVariants` in the import and all 3 JSX usages (`TextVariants.p` → `ContentVariants.p`).

### Fix 5 — `Text` → `Content` (line 21)
**Applied.** Replaced all `<Text component={...}>` JSX elements with `<Content component={...}>`. Removed `Text` from imports, added `Content` (shared with Fix 6).

### Fix 6 — `TextContent` → `Content` (line 14)
**Applied.** Replaced `<TextContent className="text-muted">` with `<Content className="text-muted">` and its closing tag. Removed `TextContent` from imports (already covered by `Content` added in Fix 5).

  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>
